use_cases: Payment confirmation requiring users to swipe to complete a transaction
Account verification flows where users drag to confirm identity
Terms of service acceptance gates on signup forms
Age verification gates for restricted content
ai_summary: A swipe-to-verify button component that requires users to drag a thumb or indicator across a track to confirm an action. The component features drag-based interaction with visual feedback states including idle, swiping, validated, and reset. Commonly used for payment verification, consent confirmation, or action verification in fintech, e-commerce, and SaaS applications. Supports customizable text, gap spacing, and validation duration.
